tweet_text: 🚨 Bayern Munich defeat Manchester United 2-1 in the Women's Champions League quarter-finals, advancing 5-3 on aggregate. Marc Skinner calls for more investment in experienced players! ⚽️💪 #WCL #MUFC
article_title: Skinner urges investment as Bayern end Manchester United WCL run in quarter-finals

tweet_text: 🚨 Marcus Rashford's contract clause has expired, raising questions about his future at Manchester United. Additionally, he has been charged by the FA. 🔴⚽ #MUFC #Rashford
article_title: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford contract clause expires and Red Devils star charged by FA

tweet_text: 🚨 FIFA raises World Cup ticket prices again, leaving fans frustrated as they face issues purchasing tickets for the 2026 tournament in the USA. 🎟️💔 #WorldCup2026 #FIFAFail
article_title: FIFA hike up World Cup ticket prices AGAIN as angry fans suffer issues trying to buy them
